introSection: Famous Jack is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster currently located at Bagatelle in Merlimont, Hauts-de-France, France. It was built by Reverchon and first operated at Pleasurewood Hills from August 2000 to 2005 as Mouse Trap. It opened at its current location on 25 April 2006.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: When the ride was named Ragondingue, it was painted orange with blue supports, the same as in Pleasurewood Hills. As Famous Jack, the ride is painted brown with red supports.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The trains have mouse faces on the front of them.

fullText:
Famous Jack is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster currently located at Bagatelle in Merlimont, Hauts-de-France, France. It was built by Reverchon and first operated at Pleasurewood Hills from August 2000 to 2005 as Mouse Trap. It opened at its current location on 25 April 2006.



When the ride was named Ragondingue, it was painted orange with blue supports, the same as in Pleasurewood Hills. As Famous Jack, the ride is painted brown with red supports.

The trains have mouse faces on the front of them.
